title: Wuhan-Sichuan-Chongqing Road Trip Loop
description: Self-driving route: Wuhan -> Yichang -> Chongqing -> Yibin -> Leshan -> Mount Emei -> Dujiangyan -> Chengdu -> Wanzhou -> Jingzhou -> Wuhan.
